# Workspace Instructions

- The main app is a Cordova project rooted in `MyApp`.
- Primary web assets live in `MyApp/www`.
- Keep the top-level `index.html` browser preview aligned with the Cordova app UI and data.
- Prefer focused updates to the inventory experience instead of replacing the project structure.
- Update `README.md` when user-facing behavior or run instructions change.
- Keep edits ASCII unless an existing file already requires something else.
